name: Spaghetti Martini
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan, heat the butter and olive oil over medium heat.
2. Add shallots and garlic, and sauté for about 2 minutes.
3. Add jalapeno and sauté for an additional 30 seconds.
4. Add chopped tomatoes, vodka, vermouth, lime juice, tomato paste, white pepper, coriander, and salt.
5. Raise the heat and reduce the mixture, stirring frequently, for about 3 minutes.
6. Add red bell pepper, simmer for 2-3 minutes.
7. Stir in heavy cream and reduce until desired consistency is reached (about 10 minutes).
8. Remove from heat and stir in cilantro, parsley, Parmesan cheese, and garnish with olives and fresh cilantro if desired.
Serve the pasta topped generously with the sauce.
